content:
According to my own test, multiple email addresses in "To" field are allowed, but only if the addresses are entered one at a time.

Method 1: Tap "To" field > enter one address > enter character "," (comma) > enter another address > enter character "," (comma).

Method 2: Tap "To" field > enter one address > press "enter" key > tap "To" field again > enter another address > press "enter" key.

The following method is not allowed: Copy a string of multiple addresses separated by commas > tap "To" field > paste that string.
creator: Yu5tiqX9og

You have checked that the account configuration matches your mail provider's specs?

content: I had this problem. Partially installed all my accounts using the QR codes from desktop saying i would enter the passwords later but then couldn't find where to enter the passwords! (I did find it for one account but then couldnt find it again to do the rest). I reinstalled using the QR code from my desktop Thunderbird. (Have lots of accounts so had to do more than one QR code). After each code was 'done' there was a list of accounts and the option of enter passwords or later but the enter passwords was greyed out. I found out that selecting each account in the list allowed me to enter the password for that account (didn't have to for every account...google seemed to be easier than ms hotmail/outlook), it also directed me to a link to allow Thunderbird to access that account. I had to do this for each account after each QR code but now I have full access to every account... Couldn't find info about this in the help section etc - might be something the developers could make clearer...still now loving this as much as my Thunderbird desktop - makes managing multiple email accounts much easier

content:
You can either sync email or push email.

- - -

Method A. Sync email:

1. Configure poll frequency: "Settings" > "Accounts" section > tap the account you want to configure > "Fetching mail" > "Folder poll frequency" > choose the option you prefer.

Please note that the minimum poll interval is 15 minutes. If 15 minutes is too long for you, you should use push email instead.

2. Select the folders to sync: Tap hamburger button (three horizontal bar) on the top left corner. If your email accounts are hidden, tap "Show accounts" at the bottom of the screen > tap the account you want to configure > "Manage folders" > tap the folder you want to configure > turn on "Enable sync" and turn off "Enable Push".

- - -

Method B. Push email:

The following link might be helpful: Configure push email for Thunderbird for Android https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/configure-push-email-thunderbird-android
creator: Yu5tiqX9og
